character_designs.identity: 37-year-old Canyang Ao village physician, Shen Weisang's mother, and quiet keeper of old relay-road code

body_and_face.age_lock: Clearly 37, a beautiful adult woman with warmth and resilience; not elderly and not girlish.
body_and_face.build: Medium-height, practical village-physician build with soft maternal steadiness and labor-trained hands.
body_and_face.face: Refined, warm, beautiful features; gentle bright eyes, calm brows, dignified mouth, sun-and-smoke-warmed skin.
body_and_face.hair: Work hair wrapped under a blue-green cloth head scarf, with only small controlled strands visible.
body_and_face.posture: Protective and steady; she blocks danger through hand placement, stance, cabinet shielding, and quiet resolve.

constant_anchors: mortar, water jar, and herb bundles
half Sun-Moon relay token mostly covered by palm or cloth in fire farewell state

state_designs.silhouette: Village physician in complete practical layers: head scarf, narrow-sleeved medicine top, herb-green apron, waist tools, herb basket.
materials: old wood basket and medicine cabinet
state_designs.color_logic: Canyang Ao earth brown and old wood ground the figure; herb green and blue-green identify the medicine room; late-wheat warmth touches skin and basket edges.
state_designs.damage_level: Clean work wear with herb stains, smoke dust, and small repairs only.
required_details: must read as a beautiful 37-year-old mother and physician
head scarf and apron must remain clear
herb basket and waist copper scissors must be visible
no public Zhaoming badge or clean sun-moon emblem

state_designs.silhouette: Same physician costume, but with more guarded hands and hidden old-relay tool logic; no external transformation.
materials: old wood cabinet bottom with worn partial route scratch
state_designs.color_logic: Medicine-room greens and browns dominate; worn-gold old-relay scratch appears only as a tiny hidden under-cabinet detail.
required_details: identity remains hidden under physician surface
one hand or herb basket may partially block a cabinet-bottom secret
old relay mark must be partial, worn, concealed, and non-readable
no secret-order robe, no priestess silhouette, no clean badge

state_designs.silhouette: Same mother-physician silhouette in smoke, head scarf loosened, apron soot-darkened, hand passing the half token.
materials: half relay token mostly covered in palm or cloth
state_designs.color_logic: Canyang herb green and earth brown are dulled by soot; fire-dark red and ember warmth appear as limited edge accents; the half-token remains a small worn gold and moon-white object, not a public emblem.
state_designs.damage_level: Smoke, soot, loosened scarf, singed apron edge, and small shoulder-side wound indication; no gore or ragged collapse.
required_details: mother and physician dignity must remain
beauty and age lock must survive distress
half-token pass-off is readable but mostly covered

detail_panels.purpose: Prevent age drift or generic peasant anonymity.
detail_panels.notes: Beautiful 37-year-old face, warm eyes, calm resolve, smoke-warmed skin, not elderly.
Blue-green cloth wraps practical hair; no court hairpiece or priestess veil.
Herb-green apron, narrow sleeves, herb stains, clean complete construction.

detail_panels.purpose: Show physician craft and action readiness.
detail_panels.notes: Small copper scissors, herb thread, cloth pouch, medicine packets, simple cord knots.
Hand passing the half token almost covered by palm or cloth; no clean full emblem.

detail_panels.purpose: Tie Luo Qinghe to Canyang Ao medicine-room geography.
detail_panels.notes: Herb basket, mortar, water jar, old wood cabinet, no readable labels.

detail_panels.purpose: Show relay-code identity without public faction display.
detail_panels.notes: Tiny worn-gold route scratch or partial old mark under cabinet board, hidden and incomplete.
Soot, loosened scarf, singed apron edge, firm protective hand, dignity under pain.

negative_rules: full Zhaoming badge on scarf, apron, chest, sleeve, basket, belt front, medicine cabinet face, wall, or background
